title: Ecoasis Sans
description: A sans-based x32 font pack for the Ecoasis collection.
body:
Howdy y'all, Here is the first part in my Ecoasis resource pack collection plan!
It is intended to be paired with my Ecoasis modpack (work in progress), but can comfortably be used by itself. **Ecoasis Sans** is a x32 resolution Minecraft font that is loosely based on the free **[Averia Sans Libre](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Averia+Sans+Libre)** font.
Currently only the `ascii.png` file has been retextured, but support for more unicode and special characters will come in future updates. ![The Ascii text characters displayed in-game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3444912ceef28bf50812d67472f69be211281261.png) **Shaded Version: [Ecoasis Sans (Shaded)](https://modrinth.com/project/fuLIHMWn)** Enjoy :)
